judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s plan was flawed: it queried cases with only a lower bound on createddate (createddate >= '2023-05-02'), thus including October cases beyond the “past four months,” and applied the “processed more than one case” filter only to non-transferred closed cases (grouping df_filtered_cases by ownerid) rather than counting all processed assignments, which led it to select 005Wt000003NIddIAG instead of the ground-truth 005Wt000003NDqDIAW.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
Using the results from query_db (function-call-2154603278393169455) and execute_python (function-call-3102628940640552495), the agent filtered only closed cases within the last four months and then applied the “processed more than one case” threshold to that closed subset (case_count > 1), instead of counting all handled cases (including open/transferred) as required, leading it to conclude “No agent…” instead of returning 005Wt000003NDqDIAW.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
